title: Move work off the main thread
description: Relocate heavy or blocking work to a background context and marshal only the UI update back to main.
body: Steps: 1. Profile to find the main-thread hang (Time Profiler / hangs instrument) — image decode, parsing, disk, or sync network. 2. Move the heavy work to a background context (Task with appropriate priority, a background queue, or a non-main actor). 3. Compute results off-main, then hop to @MainActor/DispatchQueue.main to apply UI changes. 4. Ensure shared mutable state accessed from multiple threads is synchronized or actor-isolated. 5. Re-profile to confirm the main thread stays responsive. Rollback point: before introducing concurrency around shared state (data-race risk). Validation: the UI stays responsive and the Main Thread Checker shows no off-main UI access; moving work off main but then touching views from the background trades a hang for a crash.
